backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing a kurta e-commerce backend with product catalog (seeded with multiple collections), per-user cart management, and order placement using stable Maps and Lists.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the clickable phone number (tel:8130422230) in the site footer was implemented in Footer.tsx.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a reference for the project's frontend architecture.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell that sets the page title to 'Lamiya Creation' and mounts the React app via the /src/main.tsx module entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes (home, product detail, cart, checkout, order confirmation) and wraps the layout with CartProvider and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying brand info, a clickable tel:8130422230 phone link with a Phone icon, quick navigation links, category list, copyright, and a caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky site header with the Lamiya Creation logo, desktop and mobile navigation links, and a cart icon badge showing the live item count from CartContext.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Reusable product card component that displays product image (with category-based fallbacks), name, price in INR, out-of-stock overlay, and an Add to Cart button with loading state.
frontend/src/context/CartContext.tsx: Defines a React context and provider for managing shopping cart state, including items, total, and operations like add, remove, update quantity, and clear.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functionality and identity state to the React component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for all backend interactions including fetching products, managing cart operations, checkout, and retrieving orders via the ICP actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines CSS custom properties for the brand's light/dark color themes including terracotta, gold, and Ramadan palette tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Cart page component that displays cart items with quantity controls and removal, shows an empty state, and provides navigation to checkout.
frontend/src/pages/CheckoutPage.tsx: Checkout page that collects delivery name and address, validates input, submits the order via the checkout mutation, clears the cart, and navigates to an order confirmation page.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main landing page displaying a hero banner, category filter tabs, collection cards, and a filterable product grid with add-to-cart functionality.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmationPage: Order confirmation page that reads orderId, total, and name from URL search params and displays a success message with order details.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetailPage.tsx: Product detail page showing a single product's image, size selector, quantity picker, and add-to-cart button, with loading and error states.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts (Playfair Display, Inter), OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, and animation keyframes for the Lamiya Creation theme.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking existing features and pending feature requests, currently noting a completed footer phone-number feature and a pending request to add phone number 8130422230 to the site.
